boundary_geometry.notes: KSC wetland scene: thin elongated class regions (marshes, cypress, scrub) narrower than r*=7. Adjacency witness replaces proxy with deterministic 10x10 synthetic label grid capturing 1-pixel-wide stripe fragmentation pattern. Real adj_rate_4 from GT label mask to be substituted in production use.

adjacency_witness.notes: 10x10 synthetic label grid: 1-pixel-wide horizontal stripes of 3 classes. All 90 vertical edges are cross-class; 0 horizontal edges cross class. adj_rate_4 = 90/180 = 0.5. This is a reproducible proxy for KSC-like fragmentation; replace gt_label_grid with the real 512x614 KSC GT mask in production (v1.2 upgrade).
